title: Universal Retexture
description: A resource pack focused on retexture mod content
body:
# 
**IMPORTANT: Not all assets get retextured, depending on the wishes of the artists involved in the retexture, some mods only get one or two retextured assets**
# 
This is a resource pack focused on retexture mod content, initiated by HmuKt and produced by multiple artists.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09ceccf9cc1f0775ba320385cb0a295647dc489.png)

> More images in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/universal-mod-retexture/gallery).

You can also find some unused old assets in this pack, and if you like these better, you are free to replace them. This resource packs can be used in any modpack as long as credit is given.

**Currently supported mods:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Advent Of Ascension 3](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventofascension)
- [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
- [BYG](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)
- [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)
- [Enigmatic Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/enigmatic-legacy)
- [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
- [Lycanites Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lycanites-mobs)
- [Mob Battle](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-battle-mod)
- [Better Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-survival-mod)
- [Mutant Beasts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mutant-beasts)
- [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching)
- [Rats](https://modrinth.com/mod/rats)
- [Rough Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/rough-tweaks-revamped)
- [Scaling Health](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scaling-health)
- [Simple Difficulty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simpledifficulty)
- [Spartan and Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-and-fire) / [Spartan Weaponry: Ice and Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry-ice-and-fire)
- [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry)
- [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid)
- [Trumpet Skeleton](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trumpet-skeleton-redooted)
- [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- [The Lord of the Rings: Legacy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-lord-of-the-rings-mod-legacy)

</details>

#

**Credits:**

> Pack Managers: HmuKt, 圣古金源

> Artists: 花草忍, 骷髅之凋(KuLou_D), 京墨, 维多, 陌林(Morineas), 圣古金源(EricTe5la), 千村(thousvillages), 杜格(doggo_fc6dca), 鸡腿(onion/soap), 岩晶之刃(Halitefork), 太菜老君, 形, 星海(StarOcean), 蓝玫瑰, 依雨姬, GMG, 寒星, 鸡肉上单, 人, 九十月(Fractur9d_Luna)

> Special Thanks: 若凌君, 黎源(Jun_naturefox)
